latin: Pater, filia rapta, raptoribus per telephonum locutus est: 'artes quasdam singulares habeo. vos inveniam. et vos necabo.'

questions.prompt: What happened to the man's daughter?

questions.target: He will find them and kill them
choices: He will find them and kill them

translation: A father, after his daughter was kidnapped, spoke to the kidnappers by phone: 'I have certain unique skills. I will find you. And I will kill you.'
